holdings.infoBox: AEMS is an equity ETF with a total of 82 individual holdings. The top holdings are E-mini S&P 500 Future Sept 26 stock at 50.49%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 17.55%, Future on US Dollar Index at 9.32%, Advanced Micro Devices at 1.07%, and Lumentum Holdings at 0.77%.

overview.description: The Anfield Enhanced Market ETF (AEMS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks to track or surpass the returns of the S&P 500 Index throughout full market cycles. The strategy employs US large-cap equities and equity-linked derivatives to achieve its objectives AEMS was launched on Jun 30, 2025 and is issued by Anfield.
